<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="qqlX-ETjX68NBQ-hQmvD"> <mxGraphModel dx="4513" dy="2570" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="E43Jwe6YpT_grfqNwt3g-1" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 

" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="1490" width="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml

title Smart Urban Farming Program Logic

start

:User enters location and plant type;

:Send request to FastAPI backend;

:Retrieve plant database;

:Generate plant combination recommendation;

if (Version 2 enabled?) then (yes)

:Fetch weather data;

:Find nearby compost and supplies;

endif

if (Version 3 enabled?) then (yes)

:Check soil moisture sensor;

:Decide watering schedule automatically;

endif

:Generate planting and watering schedule;

:Send recommendation to user app;

stop

note right
Version 1:
Basic recommendation system

Version 2:
Weather and supply integration

Version 3:
Automated irrigation system
end note

@enduml
",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="lFMj1pjMqZFMG0SL4CjC-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="2361" width="1000.51" x="10" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
